basic_details.short_information: Jharkhand Urja Vikas Nigam Limited (JUVNL) Recruitment 2026 for 1 post of Medical Consultant (Contract). Candidates with MBBS Can Apply Offline. The last date to apply offline is 08-06-2026. The candidate shall apply offline through JUVNL official website.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS degree from a recognized institution / University, Valid Registration number as a medical practitioner

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for JUVNL Medical Consultant (Contract) Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
seo_tags: JUVNL Medical Consultant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
